jsonLd.title: Senior Radiologist at Breach Candy Hospital Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Breach Candy Hospital Asia Pacific Associates in Ranchi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Breach Candy Hospital Asia Pacific Associates:
Breach Candy Hospital Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Breach Candy Hospital Asia Pacific Associates!
